text: session 4 (Sat): options BUILD DEBT cleared — long-option accounting (max_loss=debit at entry), option journal validation (playbook gates 2/3/4 mechanical), chain glue verified vs broker breakeven, review_option_order dry-run clean on 563854249. Commit a8c2938, suite 1808 green. No orders; funding settles 2026-07-13.

operator relayed RH support answers to all 5 odd-lot tender mechanics questions (playbook Q1-Q5, now recorded there with full detail): election email-triggered w/ broker cutoff 1-3bd early; odd-lot pass-through CLAIMED favorable (per-customer elections, no aggregation) pending live test; fees $0 (fee schedule + support); shares locked from election to close, proceeds settled on arrival; withdrawal until broker deadline only — elect late, amendment-after-cutoff is the journaled tail risk. Kill-spec leg 2 (un-prorated acceptance) de-risked from UNKNOWN to favorable-pending-live-test.

Gmail shakedown FAILED the claim I made earlier today: zero robinhood mail in the connected inbox over 1y — RH notifies a different address. Playbook corrected; live-deal rule until resolved: assume broker cutoff = expiry minus 3 business days, deliver election to operator early. Lesson: never write a capability into the playbook before shaking it down.

Gmail watch RESOLVED same day: connector had been on the operator work account; operator re-pointed it to deaki682@gmail.com which IS the RH notification inbox (201 RH threads/90d, Level 2 approval email sighted). Event-email watch capability PROVEN; tender-email template still unseen (none ever held) so the expiry-minus-3bd fallback stands until the first live event email.
